title: Evacuate!
description: Beep beep! Fire! This mod adds firefighting stuff and evacuation releated blocks.
body:
[![modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/evacuate!)     [![curseforge](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png&n=-1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/evacuate)    [![github](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png&n=-1)](https://github.com/Minecraft-Standards-Organization/Evacuate)

![Forge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/badges/forge.png) ![NeoForge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/badges/neoforge.png)

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/H1Jp5ljG?logo=Modrinth)
![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1282664?logo=curseforge)
[![Crowdin](https://badges.crowdin.net/evacuate/localized.svg)](https://crowdin.com/project/evacuate)


# The new version originally planned to add 30 signs will instead be released in 3–4 smaller updates, each adding 5–10 signs.

This mod adds evacuation decoration like emergency exit doors, signs and some functional things like fire extinguishers and call buttons.


The mod currently adds:

- Emergency Exit Doors - 6 Types
- Crash Bar (Item)
- Fire Extinguishers - 6 Types
- EU Type Manual Call Points - 2 Colors
- ISO 7010 Signs ([See wiki for more information](https://github.com/Minecraft-Standards-Organization/Evacuate/wiki/Signs-List))
- IMO A.1116(30) and other Shipboard Safety Signs ([See wiki for more information](https://github.com/Minecraft-Standards-Organization/Evacuate/wiki/Signs-List))
- More than 30 signs (Including ISO 7010 and IMO A.1116(30). Please See wiki for excact numbers.)
 

Translations Made:

- English (en_us) - %100✅
- Russian (ru_ru) - %100✅ - Bug⚠️
- Turkish (tr_tr) - %76⚠️
- Spanish (es_es) - %26⚠️
- French (fr_fr) - %0❌
- German(de_de) - %0 - Bug⚠️ 



Help us translate in Crowdin.

 

For usage of the mod see our license page.
